mapSettings.name: Sandpoint & Hinterlands
mapSettings.scale: 1 unit = ~100 feet in town, ~0.25 miles in hinterlands

regions.name: Sandpoint
regions.description: A quaint coastal town of ~1,240 souls on the Lost Coast of Varisia

regions.name: Nettlewood
regions.description: Tangled thorny forest east of town, infested with goblins

regions.name: Tickwood
regions.description: Small hunting forest north of the Turandarok, known for wild boar

regions.name: Mosswood
regions.description: Vast redwood forest, home to the largest goblin tribe in the area

regions.name: Devil's Platter
regions.description: Limestone escarpment southeast of town; Birdcruncher goblin territory

regions.name: Brinestump Marsh
regions.description: Boggy marshland along the Soggy River delta; Licktoad goblin territory

regions.name: Shank's Wood
regions.description: Dense forest near Brinestump; Seven Tooth goblin territory

regions.name: The Tors
regions.description: Rocky coastal hills along the Lost Coast east of Sandpoint

regions.name: Sandpoint Farmlands
regions.description: Cultivated fields and pastures supplying Sandpoint

regions.name: Varisian Gulf
regions.description: Cold waters of the gulf stretching to the horizon

regions.name: Lost Coast Road (South)
regions.description: Coast road heading south toward Magnimar (~50 miles)

locations.name: Sandpoint Cathedral
locations.description: Grand cathedral dedicated to Desna, Sarenrae, Abadar, Shelyn, Gozreh, and Erastil

locations.name: Sandpoint Boneyard
locations.description: Town cemetery behind the cathedral

locations.name: The White Deer
locations.description: Upscale inn with views of the Varisian Gulf

locations.name: The Way North
locations.description: Maphouse and library of sea charts

locations.name: Jeweler
locations.description: Dwarven jeweler renowned for fine craft

locations.name: Junker's Edge
locations.description: Cliff-side dump where junk is thrown into the sea

locations.name: Gorvi's Shack
locations.description: Home of the half-orc street cleaner

locations.name: Brodert Quink's Home
locations.description: Home of the Thassilonian sage

locations.name: Locksmith
locations.description: Locksmithing services and key duplication

locations.name: Sandpoint Garrison
locations.description: Headquarters of the town guard and militia

locations.name: Sandpoint Town Hall
locations.description: Seat of town government and courts

locations.name: Savah's Armory
locations.description: The town's primary weapons and armor dealer

locations.name: Risa's Place
locations.description: Quiet tavern run by an ancient Varisian sorceress

locations.name: Rovanky Tannery
locations.description: Leather tanning operation on the eastern edge of town

locations.name: Red Dog Smithy
locations.description: Foul-tempered but skilled blacksmith

locations.name: The Pillbug's Pantry
locations.description: Herbalist and apothecary

locations.name: Bottled Solutions
locations.description: Alchemist shop with unpredictable wares

locations.name: Cracktooth's Tavern
locations.description: Bar with a large performance stage

locations.name: House of Blue Stones
locations.description: Small monastery dedicated to Irori

locations.name: Sandpoint Glassworks
locations.description: Glass factory owned by the Kaijitsu family — key Chapter 1 location

locations.name: Sandpoint Savories
locations.description: The town's beloved bakery

locations.name: The Curious Goblin
locations.description: Surprisingly well-stocked bookshop

locations.name: Sandpoint Theater
locations.description: The town's cultural center for plays and performances

locations.name: Carpenter's Guild
locations.description: Headquarters of the local carpenter's association

locations.name: Sandpoint Lumber Mill
locations.description: Timber processing facility on the river

locations.name: General Store
locations.description: The oldest and best-stocked general store in town

locations.name: Turandarok Academy
locations.description: Orphanage and school for Sandpoint's children

locations.name: Madame Mvashti's House
locations.description: Home of Sandpoint's oldest resident, a Varisian seer

locations.name: Grocer's Hall
locations.description: Guild hall selling local farm produce

locations.name: Vernah's Fine Clothing
locations.description: Fine clothing for nobles and wealthy visitors

locations.name: Wheen's Wagons
locations.description: Wagon and transport services

locations.name: Scarnetti Mill
locations.description: Lumber mill owned by the Scarnetti family

locations.name: The Hagfish
locations.description: Popular tavern with fishermen, gamblers, and the famous hagfish challenge

locations.name: Valdemar Fishmarket
locations.description: Fresh seafood from the Gulf

locations.name: Sandpoint Market
locations.description: Open-air market with vendors from Magnimar twice weekly

locations.name: Sandpoint Meat Market
locations.description: The town butcher

locations.name: The Rusty Dragon
locations.description: Sandpoint's most popular tavern and inn, beloved by adventurers

locations.name: Goblin Squash Stables
locations.description: Stables run by a retired goblin hunter

locations.name: Two Knight Brewery
locations.description: Local brewery producing fine ales

locations.name: Sandpoint Mercantile League
locations.description: Merchant guild overseeing trade

locations.name: Sandpoint Boutique
locations.description: Eclectic shop: clothing, artwork, toys, tools

locations.name: Fatman's Feedbag
locations.description: Rough tavern known for brawls

locations.name: The Pixie's Kitten
locations.description: Sandpoint's establishment of ill repute

locations.name: The Feathered Serpent
locations.description: Dealer in oddities, curiosities, and magic items

locations.name: Hannah's
locations.description: Midwife and healer

locations.name: Sandpoint Shipyard
locations.description: Dry docks on the harbor

locations.name: Valdemar Manor
locations.description: Estate of the Valdemar family — shipbuilders and carpenters

locations.name: Scarnetti Manor
locations.description: Estate of the Scarnetti family — loggers and millers

locations.name: Kaijitsu Manor
locations.description: Estate of the Kaijitsu family — glassmakers and jewelers

locations.name: Deverin Manor
locations.description: Estate of the Deverin family — farmers and brewers

locations.name: The Old Light
locations.description: Ancient Thassilonian lighthouse ruin on the northwestern cliff, ~170 ft above sea level

locations.name: Chopper's Isle
locations.description: Tidal island where the serial killer Jervis Stoot once lived

locations.name: Sandpoint Bridge
locations.description: Stone bridge over the Turandarok River entering town from the north

locations.name: Thistletop
locations.description: Island fortress of the Thistletop goblins — built atop a Thassilonian sentinel's stone head

locations.name: Thistle River Ford
locations.description: River crossing through the goblin-infested Nettlewood

locations.name: Gogmurt's Lair
locations.description: The goblin druid's hidden grove in the thorny woods

locations.name: Mosswood Goblin Camp
locations.description: Main camp of the Mosswood tribe (~40 goblins), the largest in the region

locations.name: Ancient Redwood Grove
locations.description: Sacred grove of enormous redwood trees, rumored to be druid-protected

locations.name: Devil's Platter Summit
locations.description: Top of the limestone escarpment with views of the surrounding area

locations.name: Birdcruncher Cave
locations.description: Cave hideout of the Birdcruncher goblin tribe (~20 goblins)

locations.name: Brinestump Swamp Center
locations.description: Heart of the marsh where the Licktoad goblins dwell

locations.name: Soggy River Delta
locations.description: Muddy river delta where the Soggy River meets the gulf

locations.name: Licktoad Village
locations.description: Stilted goblin village in the marshes

locations.name: Seven Tooth Camp
locations.description: Hideout of the Seven Tooth goblin tribe

locations.name: Tickwood Hunting Camp
locations.description: Frequented by Sandpoint hunters tracking boar

locations.name: Foxglove Manor
locations.description: Haunted clifftop estate known as 'The Misgivings' — key Chapter 2 location

locations.name: Foxglove Farm
locations.description: Overgrown farmland once belonging to the Foxglove family

locations.name: Lost Coast Road Junction
locations.description: Where the road begins its 50-mile journey south to Magnimar

locations.name: Magnimar (distant)
locations.description: Major city 50 miles south — population 16,428

forcedMarch.description: After 8 hours, Fort save each hour (DC 10 + 2 per extra hour). Failure = 1d6 nonlethal + fatigued. If already fatigued, become exhausted.
